arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti sends public warning to Real Madrid players ahead of Atlético clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has fired something of a warning the way of his players on Saturday evening. This comes after an outing to forget for Los Blancos…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “If we play like this, we won’t win vs Atletico Madrid on Tuesday”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media after the team’s 2-1 loss to Real Betis on Saturday. In a very brief press conference, Ancelotti made his feelings clear about the team’s chances to win against Atletico Madrid if they play this way.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid loses at Betis as Isco spearheads a 2-1 comeback win over former team
arts.sum: Isco left Madrid three years ago, having helped it win five Champions League titles before he lost his starting job and then struggled to get off the bench. Real Madrid stumbled in the three-way race for the Spanish league title as Isco Alarcón guided Real Betis to a 2-1 comeback win over the defending champion on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos 'to battle Liverpool, Man United' for Bournemouth star
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly join the likes of Liverpool and Manchester United in the race for for Bournemouth defender Milos Kerkez.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star names Real Madrid attacker as toughest opponent he has ever faced
arts.sum: Barcelona star Ronald Araújo has this weekend named a member of the attacking ranks at arch rivals Real Madrid as the toughest opponent whom he has ever faced. The player…

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior reaches enormous Real Madrid milestone
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior reached an impressive milestone in his Real Madrid career on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Florentino Pérez holds personal meeting with Real Madrid star
arts.sum: Real Madrid president Florentino Pérez this week went out of his way to hold a personal meeting with a member of the club’s defensive ranks. That’s according to Marca, who…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid centre-back 'turns down' new contract following £33m Premier League transfer rejection
arts.sum: Real Madrid defender Raul Asencio apparently turns down Los Blancos' first offer of a new contract amid interest from 'several teams' in the burgeoning centre-back.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s biggest weakness exposed, with Champions League looming
arts.sum: And the biggest question marks center around two areas: the midfield, following Dani Ceballos’ injury, with Eduardo Camavinga and Luka Modric emerging as the main alternatives; and the right-back position, where Carlo Ancelotti continues to experiment without landing on a reliable solution. In San Sebastián, despite having Lucas available, Ancelotti opted to start Asencio at right-back - a gamble that backfired almost immediately.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti reveals Federico Valverde injury return timeline
arts.sum: Fede Valverde has been sidelined with "discomfort" according to Carlo Ancelotti.
